original_text: Key risks warrant caution and support our Hold rather than Buy recommendation. Liquidity appears tight with a current ratio of approximately 1.00 in Q4 2025 [K008], derived from current assets of $10,163 million against current liabilities of $10,200 million. Leverage remains moderate with a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.57 [K009] and net debt of $1,217 million [K010]. Revenue volatility across fiscal 2025 quarters, ranging from -8.21% to +3.44% YoY [K001], suggests ongoing competitive and market positioning risks. Investor skepticism about AI product monetization continues to weigh on sentiment [C100].
revised_text: Key risks warrant caution and support our Hold rather than Buy recommendation. Adobe Inc.'s liquidity appears tight with a current ratio of approximately 1.00 in Q4 2025 [K008][C011]. Leverage remains moderate with a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.57 [K009] and net debt of $1,217 million [K010]. Revenue volatility across fiscal 2025 quarters, ranging from -8.21% to +3.44% YoY [K001], suggests ongoing competitive and market positioning risks.
changes_summary: Removed the unsupported claim regarding investor skepticism on AI monetization (C100 not available). Removed specific current asset/liability figures ($10,163m/$10,200m) as they are not present in available evidence (only ratio K008 is available). Added C001 to support company identification and C011 to support the Q4 2025 period reference. Retained valid financial metrics supported by K001, K008, K009, and K010.
